name: 10X Genomics + CITE-seq Protocol

usage.en: Single-cell preparation from solid tumor with Percoll gradient purification, CITE-seq antibody staining with hashing (HTO), and 10X Chromium loading.
usage.zh: 从实体瘤制备单细胞悬液，Percoll 密度梯度纯化，CITE-seq 抗体染色（含 hashing），10X Chromium 上样。

materials.name: 1× HBSS without Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ (with and without Phenol Red)
CITE-seq staining buffer, Wash Buffers A/B/C

components.name: Step 1 (Dissociation): Prepare dissociation medium per Miltenyi kit. Mince 0.04-1 g tumor with razor. Transfer to tube, rotate 37°C 1 h.
Step 2: Centrifuge 400 g 4°C 5 min. Aspirate, add 10 mL cold PBS, filter through 40-70 µm strainer.
Step 3 (Percoll gradient): Resuspend pellet in 4 mL 70% Percoll. Layer 4 mL 37% Red Percoll on top. Layer 4 mL 30% Percoll on top.

note.en: Prepare Percoll day-of-use only. Keep at RT (22-25°C).
note.zh: Percoll 仅当天配制。保持室温 (22-25°C)。

components.name: Step 4: Centrifuge swinging bucket 800 g, 25 min, RT, LOWEST acceleration, NO BRAKE.

note.en: CRITICAL: Low acceleration and no brake prevent gradient disruption.
note.zh: 关键：低加速和无制动防止梯度破坏。

components.name: Step 5: Remove layers above buffy coat at 37%/70% interface (slowly, tip at surface). Extract buffy coat with wide-bore tip into new 15 mL tube.
Step 6: Wash to 15 mL with cold PBS. Centrifuge 400 g 7 min 4°C. Resuspend in staining buffer.
Step 7 (Fc block): Resuspend 0.5M cells in 50 µL FcR block (1:5 in staining buffer). Incubate 20 min on ice.
Step 8 (CITE-seq staining): Add 50 µL antibody cocktail (0.125 µg each CITE-seq Ab + unique HTO antibody per sample). Incubate 25 min on ice.

note.en: CRITICAL: Each sample must receive a UNIQUE HTO antibody for hashing.
note.zh: 关键：每个样本必须使用唯一的 HTO 抗体。

components.name: Step 9 (Washes): Wash with ≥5 mL staining buffer (350-400 g 5 min 4°C) → Wash A → Wash B → Wash C. Count cells during final wash.
Step 10: Resuspend at 1,600 cells/µL in staining buffer for 10X superloading.

notes.en: Percoll preparation: Working stock (WS) = 6.42 mL Percoll + 0.71 mL 10× HBSS. 70% = 3.5 mL WS + 1 mL 1× HBSS. 37% Red = 1.85 mL WS + 2.65 mL red HBSS. 30% = 1.5 mL WS + 3 mL 1× HBSS. Red HBSS enhances buffy coat visibility. Centrifuge Percoll within 10 min of layering. Minimize Percoll carryover when extracting buffy coat. Titrate antibodies by flow cytometry before CITE-seq.
notes.zh: Percoll 配制：工作液 (WS) = 6.42 mL Percoll + 0.71 mL 10× HBSS。70% = 3.5 mL WS + 1 mL 1× HBSS。37% 红 = 1.85 mL WS + 2.65 mL 含酚红 HBSS。30% = 1.5 mL WS + 3 mL 1× HBSS。分层后 10 分钟内离心。取 buffy coat 时减少 Percoll 带出。

ref: Adapted from 10X Genomics + CITE-seq protocol; BioLegend TotalSeq guidelines

note.en: Cell pellet can be kept on ice in PBS for up to 30 min before Percoll gradient
note.zh: 细胞沉淀可在 PBS 中冰上保存 30 分钟后再做 Percoll 梯度

note.en: Washed single-cell suspension can be kept on ice for 1 h before staining
note.zh: 洗涤后的单细胞悬液可在冰上保存 1 小时后再染色

detailedSteps.en: Prepare enzyme mix per Miltenyi Tumor Dissociation Kit. Mince 0.04–1 g tumor tissue with a sterile razor blade into ~1 mm³ pieces
detailedSteps.zh: 按 Miltenyi 肿瘤解离试剂盒配制酶液。将 0.04–1 g 肿瘤组织用无菌刀片切成 ~1 mm³ 碎块

detailedSteps.en: Transfer minced tissue to gentleMACS C tube with enzyme mix. Rotate at 37°C for 1 h (or use gentleMACS Octo Dissociator)
detailedSteps.zh: 将碎块转入含酶液的 gentleMACS C 管。37°C 旋转孵育 1 h（或用 gentleMACS Octo 解离仪）

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge 400×g, 5 min, 4°C. Aspirate supernatant. Add 10 mL cold PBS and filter through 40–70 µm strainer
detailedSteps.zh: 400×g 离心 5 min，4°C。吸去上清。加 10 mL 冷 PBS，过 40–70 µm 滤网

detailedSteps.en: Prepare Percoll working stock (WS): 6.42 mL Percoll + 0.71 mL 10× HBSS. Make 70% (3.5 mL WS + 1 mL 1× HBSS), 37% Red (1.85 mL WS + 2.65 mL red HBSS), 30% (1.5 mL WS + 3 mL 1× HBSS)
detailedSteps.zh: 配制 Percoll 工作液 (WS): 6.42 mL Percoll + 0.71 mL 10× HBSS。配 70%（3.5 mL WS + 1 mL 1× HBSS）、37% 红色（1.85 mL WS + 2.65 mL 含酚红 HBSS）、30%（1.5 mL WS + 3 mL 1× HBSS）

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend cell pellet in 4 mL 70% Percoll. Layer 4 mL 37% Red Percoll gently on top, then 4 mL 30% Percoll on top of that
detailedSteps.zh: 将细胞沉淀重悬于 4 mL 70% Percoll。缓慢覆加 4 mL 37% 红色 Percoll，再覆加 4 mL 30% Percoll

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge swinging-bucket rotor at 800×g, 25 min, RT. Use LOWEST acceleration and NO BRAKE
detailedSteps.zh: 摇摆转头 800×g 离心 25 min，室温。使用最低加速和无制动

detailedSteps.en: Carefully remove layers above buffy coat at the 37%/70% interface. Extract buffy coat with wide-bore tip into fresh 15 mL tube
detailedSteps.zh: 小心去除 37%/70% 界面上方液层。用宽口吸头提取 buffy coat 至新 15 mL 管

detailedSteps.en: Wash to 15 mL with cold PBS. Centrifuge 400×g, 7 min, 4°C. Resuspend pellet in staining buffer
detailedSteps.zh: 用冷 PBS 补至 15 mL。400×g 离心 7 min，4°C。用染色缓冲液重悬沉淀

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend 0.5×10⁶ cells in 50 µL FcR Blocking Reagent (1:5 in staining buffer). Incubate 20 min on ice
detailedSteps.zh: 将 0.5×10⁶ 细胞重悬于 50 µL FcR 封闭试剂（1:5 稀释于染色缓冲液）。冰上孵育 20 min

detailedSteps.en: Add 50 µL antibody cocktail (0.125 µg each CITE-seq Ab + unique HTO antibody per sample). Incubate 25 min on ice
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 50 µL 抗体混合液（每种 CITE-seq 抗体 0.125 µg + 每个样本唯一的 HTO 抗体）。冰上孵育 25 min

detailedSteps.en: Wash 3× with staining buffer: centrifuge 350–400×g, 5 min, 4°C. Perform sequential washes with Wash A, Wash B, and Wash C. Count cells during final wash
detailedSteps.zh: 用染色缓冲液洗涤 3 次：350–400×g 离心 5 min，4°C。依次用 Wash A、Wash B、Wash C 洗涤。最后一次洗涤时计数

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend cells at 1,600 cells/µL in staining buffer. Load onto 10X Chromium controller per manufacturer instructions
detailedSteps.zh: 用染色缓冲液将细胞浓度调至 1,600 cells/µL。按厂商说明上样至 10X Chromium 控制器

briefSteps.en: Dissociate tumor → filter → Percoll gradient → collect buffy coat → wash → Fc block → CITE-seq Ab + HTO staining → wash A/B/C → count → 10X Chromium load
briefSteps.zh: 肿瘤解离 → 过滤 → Percoll 梯度 → 收集 buffy coat → 洗涤 → Fc 封闭 → CITE-seq 抗体 + HTO 染色 → 洗涤 A/B/C → 计数 → 10X Chromium 上样
